mainEntity.name: Do client reviews on Yelp affect AI lawyer referrals in NYC?
mainEntity.text: Do client reviews on Yelp affect AI lawyer referrals in NYC?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, high-volume consistent Yelp reviews signal trustworthiness to AI, strengthening NYC firm recommendations alongside Avvo ratings.[3]

suggestedAnswer.text: AI seeks patterns like 'responsive NYC litigator' across 20+ reviews. Respond to all. Fake reviews risk penalties. NYC volume high—aim 50+. Boosts over directories alone. Opponents review-bomb; report promptly.[3]

name: Yelp Reviews Impact on NYC AI Referrals
